# services.bitmagnet

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.bitmagnet`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.bitmagnet.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bitmagnet service. |
| `services.bitmagnet.group` | `string` | Group of user running bitmagnet |
| `services.bitmagnet.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open DHT ports in firewall |
| `services.bitmagnet.package` | `package` | The bitmagnet package to use. |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Bitmagnet configuration (https://bitmagnet.io/setup/configuration.html). |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.dht_server` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | DHT server settings |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.dht_server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | DHT listen port |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.http_server` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | HTTP server settings |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.http_server.local_address` | `string` | HTTP server listen address |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.postgres` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | PostgreSQL database configuration |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.postgres.host` | `string` | Address, hostname or Unix socket path of the database server |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.postgres.name` | `string` | Database name to connect to |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.postgres.password` | `string` | Password for database user |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.postgres.user` | `string` | User to connect as |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.tmdb` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | TMDB api settings |
| `services.bitmagnet.settings.tmdb.api_key` | `null or string` | TMDB api key, to avoid api limits. Leave null to use the default shared key. |
| `services.bitmagnet.useLocalPostgresDB` | `boolean` | Use a local postgresql database, create user and database |
| `services.bitmagnet.user` | `string` | User running bitmagnet |
